fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contents of the Invoice Disc. Code field on the customer card.

fields.name: Minimum Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the minimum amount that the invoice must total for the discount to be granted or the service charge levied. For discounts, only sales lines where the Allow Invoice Disc. field is selected are included in the calculation.

fields.name: Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount percentage that the customer can receive by buying for at least the minimum amount.

fields.name: Service Charge
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the service charge that the customer will have to pay on a purchase of at least the amount in the Minimum Amount field.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for invoice discount terms.
